<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="w1GDqr9Nb5pIxSXRITBl"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="814" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" background="#FFCCCC" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "erDiagram

 COUNTRY {
 int country_id PK
 string name
 string iso_code
 bigint population
 decimal gdp_usd
 float area_km2
 }

 CAPITAL {
 int capital_id PK
 string city_name
 }

 LANGUAGE {
 int language_id PK
 string language_name
 }

 RELIGION {
 int religion_id PK
 string religion_name
 }

 COUNTRY ||--|| CAPITAL : has
 COUNTRY }o--o{ LANGUAGE : speaks
 COUNTRY }o--o{ RELIGION : practices",
 "config": null
